text:
The Laboratory in the News
Efforts Help Relaunch a Critical American Industry
Commentary by Anantha Krishnan
Advancing Next-Generation Rockets and the Engines that Power Them
Livermore engineers demonstrate the power of high-performance computing for developing a new generation of launch vehicles.
Turning an X-Ray Eye on Universes, Large and Small
Livermore applies its long-standing expertise in x-ray optics to studying dark matter and examining spent nuclear fuel.
Two-Part Microbial Detection Enhances Bioidentification
Livermore-developed technologies for detecting microbes transform biodefense efforts and inform medical treatments.
Thermite Research Heats Up
Additive manufacturing has ignited a new approach for tailoring the reactivity of materials.
